outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected due to highly positive GEX suppressing large price movements.
outlook.summary: Highly positive total GEX across all expiries creates a stable, range-bound environment. Extreme Put OI anchors structural support at 700, while heavy Call OI builds a firm ceiling at 720. Expect price pinning between these major dealer hedging zones.

levels.motivazione: Monthly gamma flip level acting as the ultimate upside resistance cap.
Major Call OI cluster in 0DTE with extreme volume acting as a strict ceiling.
Massive Call OI across all expiries pinning price right at the current spot.
Heavy mixed OI in 0DTE and Monthly creating structural friction and a micro pivot.
Weekly Max Pain level attracting price lower due to dealer hedging flows.
Colossal Put OI across all three expirations creating ultimate structural support.
